short_description: Daily football trivia: guess the mystery player and solve the Immaculate Grid!
full_description:
Test your football knowledge every day with two addictive game modes!

WHO ARE YA?
A mystery footballer is hiding behind the silhouette. You have 8 guesses to figure out who it is. Each guess reveals clues about the target player's team, league, nationality, position, and market value. Use the color-coded hints to narrow it down!

IMMACULATE GRID
A 3x3 grid of football trivia. Each cell has two criteria (team, league, nationality, or position) and you must name a player who matches both. Fill all 9 cells to complete the grid. New grid every day!

FEATURES:
- New daily puzzles at midnight UTC
- 12,000+ real footballers from Europe's top 5 leagues
- Track your winning streak and compete on the leaderboard
- Share your results with friends using visual scorecards
- Works offline - play anywhere, anytime
- Retro-themed design inspired by classic football culture
- No ads in gameplay - clean, focused experience
- Privacy-first: no personal data collected

STATS & STREAKS:
- Daily streak counter with freeze protection
- Detailed stats: games played, win rate, guess distribution
- Global leaderboard rankings

PERFECT FOR:
- Football fans who love trivia
- Daily puzzle enthusiasts
- Fans of Wordle-style guessing games
- Anyone who wants a quick 5-minute brain teaser

New content updated regularly with the latest transfer data. Download now and start your streak!
